parsed.generic_mechanism: One version preserves causal order and paragraph-scale development; the other rearranges intact sentences so references precede premises, collapsing momentum and leaving the ending without resolution.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A moves from an animal vignette through instinct, history, health consequences, and an optical-illusion exercise; concrete examples sustain attention, though emphatic repetition, promotional claims, and a closing recap blunt its control.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B retains locally readable sentences and concrete images, but places conclusions before explanations, scatters headings inside unrelated passages, reverses the chapter’s development, and stops on an unfinished setup; sustained reading becomes nearly impossible.
